abstract: Email template design system for campaigns, transactional emails, and newsletters. Covers rendering constraints across Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, and Yahoo. Explains the Outlook Word renderer limitation (tables-only layout), inline CSS requirement, dark mode strategy, image blocking fallbacks, and responsive patterns. Includes complete HTML base structure, 5 component patterns (header/hero/content/CTA/footer), 4 template types (welcome, newsletter, transactional, abandoned cart), and dark mode CSS strategy. Bulletproof button pattern and 7 common pitfalls with corrections.
